title: RED: lock Phase 2 action schema and core behavior tests
action: Add failing tests for the Phase 2 action registry, default config menus, dangerous confirmation defaults, copy-path variants, file info, create-from-filename, dissolve-folder, trash/delete confirmation gating, and failure selected_count expectations.
implementation: Extend crates/sright-core/tests/core_smoke.rs or split focused tests under crates/sright-core/tests/phase2_actions.rs.
Assert default_config includes all Phase 2 action ids plus debug.echo.
Assert dangerous_confirmation.enabled is true by default and includes file.move_to_trash and file.delete_permanently.
Use temp directories for create/dissolve/delete tests; do not touch user files.
Verify tests fail because production schema/actions do not exist yet.

criteria: cargo test -p sright-core exits non-zero before TASK-P2-002 implementation
